mapper.select: SELECT r.refund_seq ,r.payment_seq ,r.amount ,r.currency ,r.settle_amount ,r.reason ,r.status ,r.refund_type ,r.refund_request_id ,r.pg_refund_id ,r.pg_refund_transaction_id ,r.pg_response_code ,r.pg_response_message ,r.balance_before ,r.balance_after ,r.failed_reason ,r.requested_at ,r.processed_at ,u_req.name AS requested_by_name ,u_proc.name AS processed_by_name FROM event.refunds r LEFT JOIN event.users u_req ON u_req.user_seq = r.requested_by LEFT JOIN event.users u_proc ON u_proc.user_seq = r.processed_by WHERE r.payment_seq = #{paymentSeq} ORDER BY r.requested_at DESC, r.refund_seq DESC
